theory.canonical_statement: ID 490 establishes the final verification of the global wave function across the entire toroidal manifold. This normalization ensures that the probability of the system existing within the defined 153,600 node lattice is exactly unity. Any deviation from N = 1 indicates a leak into unmapped higher order dimensions, which is corrected via the Jacobian operator to maintain manifold closure. Manifold Closure: Confirms that all energy and information pathways are contained within the lemniscatic loops. Probability Conservation: Ensures that state transitions follow unitary evolution before measurement collapse.
